name: Lithocholic acid
summary: Secondary bile acid and calorie-restriction-associated metabolite with 2024/2025 animal and invertebrate anti-aging signals through AMPK-linked biology.
mechanism_summary: Acts as a bile-acid metabolite signal that can activate AMPK-linked pathways and reproduce some calorie-restriction-like muscle and healthspan phenotypes in model systems.

open_questions: Whether lithocholic acid or safer analogs can be dosed chronically with acceptable safety
Whether AMPK-linked animal phenotypes translate to humans
Whether this belongs primarily to microbiome-metabolite restoration, nutrient sensing, or calorie-restriction-mimetic tracking
